terms.definition: What this node saw, including its own measurements and peer messages observed by this node.
State read from a blockchain contract or event log through the configured RPC provider.
A modeled or replayed scenario that is not presented as observed network state or on-chain fact.
The explicit VENOM_RUNTIME_MODE value that controls artifact isolation and startup guardrails.
A fixture payload enabled by USE_TEST_PAYLOAD=true for development or demo workflows.
An artifact created under demo mode and marked so it cannot be mistaken for real judgment.
An artifact created while VENOM_RUNTIME_MODE=mainnet with real payload handling only.
A local operator setup card stored at ~/.venom/operator-card.md; it records configuration, not reputation.
A local field note written only after this node observes closeCampaign succeed on-chain.
A concise block explaining the observed scoring or abstention outcome and its limits.
A required artifact block stating current operator payment limitations and incentives.
Dashboard access is separate-process, localhost-only, read-only against Redis, and short-lived.
A Redis ACL identity for dashboard reads that must fail a startup SET sentinel check.
Product-language anchor phrase locked to one README use outside this vocabulary file.
